meta.title: Home
meta.description: Atlas Architecture — Architecture and interior design studio in São Paulo. Residential and commercial projects with personalized attention and 3D visualization.

data.headline: We design spaces that tell your story
data.subheadline: From concept to delivery, every project is developed with exclusive dedication — combining contemporary aesthetics with intelligent functionality.

items.quote: Atlas transformed our home into something we didn't even know we wanted. The process was transparent from start to finish, and the delivery exceeded all our expectations. We recommend them without hesitation.
items.name: Marina & Rodrigo Fonseca
items.description: Residence — Alto de Pinheiros, São Paulo

items.quote: We needed a studio that could convey innovation and professionalism at the same time. Atlas captured exactly that balance. The 3D visualization was key in convincing us before construction began.
items.name: Carlos Andrade
items.description: Corporate Headquarters — Itaim Bibi, São Paulo

items.quote: Our store turned out exactly as I imagined, but even better. They brought solutions I would never have thought of. The deadline was met and the budget was respected.
items.name: Paula Silveira

data.headline: Shall we create something extraordinary together?
data.text: Every project starts with a conversation. Get in touch and discover how we can transform your space.
